tldr_artifact: 4pc Deepwood Memories (HP/HP/Healing) / 4pc Tenacity of the Millelith
tldr_key_stats: HP 30K+ · ER 160-180% · Healing Bonus circlet · E > Q > NA
intro: Yaoyao is a 4-star Dendro Polearm healer who deploys Yuegui, a bouncing radish that heals allies and deals Dendro DMG. Her Elemental Burst summons multiple Yueguis for massive team-wide healing. As one of the few Dendro healers in the game, Yaoyao is invaluable in Nilou Bloom teams where self-damage from Bountiful Cores requires constant healing. She also fits comfortably in Aggravate and Quicken teams, providing Dendro resonance and sustain. Despite being a 4-star, Yaoyao's combination of off-field Dendro application and team healing makes her a top-tier support.
weapon_bottom_line: Favonius Lance provides team energy. Black Tassel R5 is a 3-star with massive HP% for healing. Kitain Cross Spear (craftable) provides EM and energy. Focus on HP and ER — damage stats are irrelevant.

weapons.name: Favonius Lance
weapons.notes: Best support option. Generates team energy. ER substat helps burst uptime.

weapons.name: Black Tassel R5
weapons.notes: Best F2P. Massive HP% for max healing. 3-star means cheap to level.

weapons.name: Kitain Cross Spear R5
weapons.notes: Craftable. EM for reaction teams + energy refund. Good for Bloom teams.

artifact_why: Best support set. 30% Dendro RES shred benefits the entire team's Dendro damage. Yaoyao's Yuegui applies Dendro off-field to maintain the debuff.
artifact_alt: 4pc Tenacity of the Millelith — 20% ATK + shield strength for the team. Use if another teammate already holds Deepwood.

main_stats.sands_note: HP% for healing. ER% sands if below 160% ER.
main_stats.goblet_note: Always HP%. Dendro DMG does nothing for healing.
main_stats.circlet_note: Healing Bonus for max healing. HP% is a budget option.

sub_priority: 4. Elemental Mastery — only for Bloom teams

teams.name: Nilou Bloom
teams.desc: Yaoyao's best team. Bountiful Cores deal self-damage — Yaoyao's massive team healing keeps everyone alive. Dendro resonance boosts EM. Off-field Dendro application from Yuegui.

teams.name: Aggravate Support
teams.desc: Yaoyao provides Dendro for Quicken + healing. Consolidates two roles into one slot. Fischl/Yae deal Aggravate damage.

teams.name: Alhaitham Spread
teams.desc: Budget Spread team. Yaoyao provides Dendro resonance + healing. Alhaitham triggers Spread. Fischl applies Electro for Quicken.

rotation_code: Nilou E×3 (Bountiful Core stance) → Nahida E+Q (mark + EM buff) → Yaoyao E (Yuegui, Dendro application) → Xingqiu E+Q (rain swords) → Yaoyao Q (team heal if needed) → Repeat
rotation_key: Yaoyao's Q requires her to stay on-field and jump/run to throw radishes. Use only when team needs emergency healing. In normal rotations, E alone provides sufficient healing.
mistakes: Building DMG stats on Yaoyao — she's a pure healer. ATK/Dendro DMG/Crit do almost nothing. HP and Healing Bonus only.
Not using Deepwood if no one else has it — 30% Dendro RES shred is essential for Dendro teams. Someone on the team MUST hold 4pc Deepwood.
Using Q unnecessarily — Yaoyao's burst locks her on-field for 5 seconds. Only use when team is low HP. Her E heals enough normally.
Not leveling E talent — Yuegui's healing scales with E talent level. Prioritize E over Q.

seo.title: Yaoyao Build Guide — Best Weapons, Artifacts, Teams | GenshinGuide
seo.description: Complete Yaoyao build guide for Genshin Impact v5.6. Best weapons for healing, Deepwood Memories build, Nilou Bloom and Aggravate team compositions.
